rationale: Review 1 correctly identifies that the `instFiberContinuousConstSMul` docstring (lines 108-109) embeds proof rationale ('since each deck transformation acts by a homeomorphism of the fibre') instead of just stating the result — a real Lean/Mathlib documentation convention violation confirmed in the diff. Acting on this yields a marginally cleaner docstring; Review 2 misses it entirely.
